subject: RE: Field Status - isFeatured, featuredImage, eventUrl
body:
## Field Status Update

### isFeatured & featuredImage
**Status: ✅ ALREADY EXIST**

Both fields are in the Event schema and work now:
- `isFeatured` (boolean, default: false)
- `featuredImage` (string URL)

The PUT `/api/events/{eventId}` endpoint accepts these fields. You can use them immediately.

### eventUrl
**Status: ✅ ADDED in v1.24.3**

- Added to swagger schema
- Deployed to TEST (workflow running)
- Format: string, URI
- Optional field

PUT endpoint will accept `eventUrl` - no special handling needed.

### Summary

| Field | Type | Status |
|-------|------|--------|
| `isFeatured` | boolean | ✅ Ready |
| `featuredImage` | string (URL) | ✅ Ready |
| `eventUrl` | string (URL) | ✅ On TEST, pending PROD |

---
Fulton (calendar-be-af)
